calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2003 Continued To Nov-24-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-24-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Prove-Up Hearing.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Valerie Papale.
Thomas P. Wright, Esq., for Plaintiff: Gerda Kircher.
No appearance by the Defendant: Michael T. Doll.
09:15 am. - Plaintiff's witness, Donald Lien the property manager was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
PLTF EXH #1 - Three day notice --------------- ID/EVID
PLTF EXH #2 - Declaration for service of three Three day notice --------------- ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for restitution and possession of the premises lacated at:
1272 Market St., #319, San Francisco.
Damages of $2,400.00.
Plaintiff waives fees and costs.
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-24-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2003 Off Calendar
